text_original: How about add more characters to the crushchallenge i get tired of doing the same characters over and over.
text_zh: 能不能在 crushchallenge 里多加点角色？老是玩那几个角色我都玩腻了。
reply_original: That is a brilliant idea! We understand that variety is key to keeping the Crush Challenge exciting. I have shared your request for more characters directly with our Product Team to spice things up. If you have specific characters in mind, please tell us at support@fantachat.ai. Stay tuned for updates and thanks for helping us grow!
reply_zh: 这是一个绝妙的主意！我们深知多样性是保持 Crush Challenge 趣味性的关键。我已经将您希望增加更多角色的请求直接反馈给了我们的产品团队，以增加游戏的趣味性。如果您有心仪的特定角色，请通过 support@fantachat.ai 告诉我们。请关注后续更新，感谢您帮助我们成长！
